name: Achernar
description: Soft, gentle, and soothing with a calm, delicate quality. Ideal for meditation, ASMR, and intimate narration where a tender touch creates warmth and closeness.

name: Achird
description: Warm, personable, and approachable with a natural conversational tone. Great for educational content, tutorials, and casual explainers where friendliness builds instant trust.

name: Algenib
description: Deep, gravelly, and textured with a rugged, cinematic quality. Perfect for dramatic narration, trailers, and content needing gravitas, edge, and a compelling masculine presence.

name: Algieba
description: Smooth, polished, and fluid with confident, unhurried delivery. Excellent for corporate narration, audiobooks, and professional presentations that need an authoritative yet accessible tone.

name: Alnilam
description: Clear, authoritative, and firm with a decisive and measured delivery. Ideal for news, announcements, and content requiring strong, confident authority.

name: Aoede
description: Light, breezy, and natural with a freely flowing quality. Excellent for lifestyle content, travel storytelling, and upbeat narration where ease and warmth feel effortless.

name: Autonoe
description: Bright, energetic, and expressive with clear, vibrant tone. Perfect for educational content, ads, and any narration needing enthusiasm, clarity, and positive momentum.

name: Callirrhoe
description: Relaxed, easy-going, and natural with a casual and comfortable feel. Great for lifestyle content, friendly explainers, and storytelling where an unforced, conversational tone matters.

name: Charon
description: Professional, informative, and clear with authoritative composure. Excellent for documentaries, factual explainers, and narration where credibility and clarity are paramount.

name: Despina
description: Smooth, refined, and elegantly polished with a poised and graceful delivery. Ideal for luxury brand narration, audiobooks, and sophisticated content requiring class and poise.

name: Enceladus
description: Breathy, intimate, and softly contemplative. Great for poetry, emotional storytelling, and personal narration where vulnerability and heartfelt authenticity resonate most.

name: Erinome
description: Clear, precise, and sharply articulate with clean, composed delivery. Perfect for technical explainers, instructional content, and professional narration demanding crisp accuracy.

name: Fenrir
description: Energetic, excitable, and dynamic with enthusiastic and high-spirited delivery. Ideal for sports commentary, gaming content, and high-energy presentations that need contagious excitement.

name: Gacrux
description: Mature, composed, and seasoned with a commanding and authoritative presence. Excellent for serious documentaries, historical narration, and content where depth and gravitas matter.

name: Iapetus
description: Crisp, clear, and measured with articulate and professional delivery. Great for educational content, news narration, and clean professional explainers requiring focused clarity.

name: Kore
description: Strong, firm, and confident with a decisive and assured quality. Ideal for leadership content, corporate narration, and authoritative storytelling where conviction and clarity lead.

name: Laomedeia
description: Upbeat, cheerful, and lively with a positive, motivating energy. Perfect for marketing, wellness content, and motivational narration where brightness and optimism inspire action.

name: Leda
description: Fresh, youthful, and vibrant with an engaging, contemporary quality. Great for youth-oriented content, social media narration, and modern storytelling that feels alive and current.

name: Orus
description: Steady, firm, and grounded with a reliable and measured delivery. Ideal for corporate content, educational narration, and authoritative explainers needing calm conviction.

name: Puck
description: Lively, upbeat, and playfully charismatic with engaging, spirited delivery. Perfect for entertainment, podcast hosting, and social content where personality and energy captivate listeners.

name: Pulcherrima
description: Bold, forward, and direct with confident, assertive delivery. Excellent for promotional content, calls-to-action, and narration that needs to command attention and drive impact.

name: Rasalgethi
description: Knowledgeable, informative, and clear with an educational and credible tone. Great for documentaries, science communication, and in-depth explainers requiring expertise and trustworthiness.

name: Sadachbia
description: Dynamic, lively, and engaging with spirited and expressive delivery. Ideal for entertainment, podcast hosting, and storytelling where energy and personality keep audiences hooked.

name: Sadaltager
description: Thoughtful, knowledgeable, and measured with credible, deliberate delivery. Perfect for educational content, expert commentary, and narration where depth and intellectual authority matter.

name: Schedar
description: Even-tempered, balanced, and neutral with steady, unbiased delivery. Excellent for news, corporate announcements, and professional narration requiring objectivity and consistency.

name: Sulafat
description: Warm, inviting, and comforting with a nurturing and heartfelt quality. Ideal for wellness content, guided meditation, and emotional storytelling where genuine warmth creates connection.

name: Umbriel
description: Relaxed, easy-going, and friendly with a casual and approachable tone. Great for lifestyle content, casual podcasts, and laid-back narration where naturalness and comfort prevail.

name: Vindemiatrix
description: Gentle, refined, and graceful with a soft and sensitively elegant delivery. Perfect for literary narration, poetry readings, and content where quiet sophistication and care shine through.

name: Zephyr
description: Bright, clear, and cheerfully expressive with an optimistic and open quality. Excellent for educational content, brand narration, and upbeat storytelling that needs warmth and energy.

name: Zubenelgenubi
description: Casual, conversational, and approachable with a relaxed and down-to-earth style. Ideal for podcasts, casual explainers, and friendly brand content where authenticity and informality connect.
